title: Dataset for amyloid formation in presence of polyphosphate and nucleic acids
author: Arluison, Veronique
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the treated CD spectra, FTIR spectrum and Electron Microscopy images supporting the publication of interaction between short RNA, polyphosphate and C-terminal region of the Hfq protein.
steps_raw: This repository contains the treated CD spectra, FTIR spectrum and Electron Microscopy images supporting the publication of interaction between short RNA, polyphosphate and C-terminal region of the Hfq protein.
